_meta.description: This file contains a serialized version of schema entities for drift.

sql.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "preference" ("key" TEXT NOT NULL, "value" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("key"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "document_role" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "can_expire" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("can_expire" IN (0, 1)), "category" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '');

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "document" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "official_code" INTEGER NOT NULL, "official_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "signed_date" TEXT NOT NULL, "content_id" INTEGER NULL, "archive_id" TEXT NULL, "created_time" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_time" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "cohort" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "group_url" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY ("id"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "teacher_group" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "name" TEXT NOT NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "teacher" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "staff_id" TEXT NULL UNIQUE, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "university" TEXT NULL, "falcuty" TEXT NULL, "is_outsider" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_outsider" IN (0, 1)), "gender" TEXT NOT NULL, "specialization" TEXT NULL, "academic_rank" TEXT NULL, "academic_degree" TEXT NULL, "academic_degree_receive_date" TEXT NULL, "phone_number" TEXT NULL, "work_email" TEXT NULL, "personal_email" TEXT NULL, "citizen_id" TEXT NULL, "date_of_birth" TEXT NULL, "bank_account" TEXT NULL, "bank_name" TEXT NULL, "pronoun" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'thầy', "deprecated_tax_code" TEXT NULL, "note" TEXT NULL, "start_teaching_year" INTEGER NULL, "teacher_group_id" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES teacher_group (id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "admission_council" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "year" TEXT NOT NULL, "president_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES teacher (id), "secretary_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES teacher (id), "member1_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES teacher (id), "member2_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES teacher (id), "member3_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES teacher (id), "establishment_decision_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "establishment_decision_date" TEXT NOT NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "student" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "admission_id" TEXT NULL, "cohort_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES cohort (id) ON UPDATE CASCADE, "management_id" TEXT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "date_of_birth" TEXT NULL, "gender" TEXT NULL, "place_of_birth" TEXT NULL, "phone_number" TEXT NULL, "personal_email" TEXT NULL, "hust_email" TEXT NULL, "truongTotNghiepDaiHoc" TEXT NULL, "nganhTotNghiepDaiHoc" TEXT NULL, "heTotNghiepDaiHoc" TEXT NULL, "xepLoaiTotNghiepDaiHoc" TEXT NULL, "ngayTotNghiepDaiHoc" TEXT NULL, "dinhHuongChuyenSau" TEXT NULL, "hocPhanDuocMien" TEXT NULL, "nganhDaoTaoThacSi" TEXT NULL, "status" TEXT NULL, "flag_extend_1" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("flag_extend_1" IN (0, 1)), "flag_extend_2" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("flag_extend_2" IN (0, 1)), "idTieuBanXetTuyen" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES admission_council (id), "idDienTuyenSinh" TEXT NULL, "thanhToanXetTuyen" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("thanhToanXetTuyen" IN (0, 1)));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "semester" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "registration_begin_date" TEXT NOT NULL, "registration_end_date" TEXT NOT NULL, "class_begin_date" TEXT NOT NULL, "class_end_date" TEXT NOT NULL, "sequence" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, "grade_submission_deadline" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "course" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "vietnamese_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "english_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "category" TEXT NOT NULL, "num_credits" INTEGER NOT NULL, "num_theory_hours" INTEGER NOT NULL, "num_practice_hours" INTEGER NOT NULL, "num_lab_hours" INTEGER NOT NULL, "num_self_study_hours" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "thesis" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "supervisor_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES teacher (id), "secondary_supervisor_id" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES teacher (id), "president_id" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES teacher (id), "first_reviewer_id" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES teacher (id), "second_reviewer_id" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES teacher (id), "secretary_id" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES teacher (id), "member_id" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES teacher (id), "student_id" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES student (id), "vietnamese_title" TEXT NOT NULL, "english_title" TEXT NOT NULL, "note" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "defense_deadline" TEXT NULL, "defense_date" TEXT NULL, "flag_tracking" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("flag_tracking" IN (0, 1)), "flag_paid" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("flag_paid" IN (0, 1)), "flag_ignore" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("flag_ignore" IN (0, 1)), "group" TEXT NULL, "nam" TEXT NULL, "defense_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "payment_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "defense_decision_id" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES document (id), "soQdGiao" TEXT NULL, "soQdBaoVe" TEXT NULL);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "academic_group" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "note" TEXT NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "phd_cohort" ("cohort" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_time" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_time" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), PRIMARY KEY ("cohort"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "phd_admission_payment_policy" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "president_payment" INTEGER NOT NULL, "secretary_payment" INTEGER NOT NULL, "member_payment" INTEGER NOT NULL, "helper_payment" INTEGER NOT NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "phd_student" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "cohort" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES phd_cohort (cohort), "management_id" TEXT NULL UNIQUE, "admission_id" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, "admission_council_decision_number" INTEGER NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "gender" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'M', "date_of_birth" TEXT NULL, "place_of_birth" TEXT NULL, "phone" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, "personal_email" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, "major_name" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Toán học', "major_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '9460101', "major_specialization" TEXT NOT NULL, "admission_president_id" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES teacher (id), "admission_secretary_id" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES teacher (id), "admission1st_member_id" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES teacher (id), "admission2nd_member_id" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES teacher (id), "admission3rd_member_id" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES teacher (id), "admission_helper_id" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES teacher (id), "admission_payment_status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'unpaid', "admission_payment_policy" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES phd_admission_payment_policy (id), "thesis" TEXT NOT NULL, "supervisor_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES teacher (id), "secondary_supervisor_id" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES teacher (id), "school_email" TEXT NULL UNIQUE, "created_time" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_time" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "status" TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "teaching_registration" ("teacher_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES teacher (id), "course_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES course (id), PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id", "course_id"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "course_limiting" ("course_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES course (id), "semester_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES semester (id), PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "semester_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "course_class" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "maLopHoc" TEXT NOT NULL, "maHocPhan" TEXT NOT NULL, "idGiangVien" INTEGER NULL, "soLuongDangKy" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "urlTruyCap" TEXT NULL, "custom_begin_date" TEXT NULL, "custom_end_date" TEXT NULL, "hocKy" TEXT NOT NULL, "phongHoc" TEXT NULL, "ngayHoc" INTEGER NULL, "tietBatDau" INTEGER NULL, "tietKetThuc" INTEGER NULL, "trangThai" INTEGER NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "teaching_assignment" ("class_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES course_class (id), "teacher_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES teacher (id), "sort_order" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, "weight" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 1.0, PRIMARY KEY ("class_id", "teacher_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "study_registration" ("class_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES course_class (id), "student_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES student (id), "mid_term_grade" REAL NULL, "final_term_grade" REAL NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("class_id", "student_id"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "thesis_defense_round" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "date" TEXT NOT NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "thesis_defense_council" ("defense_round_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES thesis_defense_round (id), "id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "thesis_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES thesis (id), "presdent_id" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES teacher (id), "reviewer1_id" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES teacher (id), "reviewer2_id" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES teacher (id), "secretary_id" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES teacher (id), "member_id" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES teacher (id), "defense_date" TEXT NULL);
